title: Crispy Ethiopian Beef Stir-fry
description: A herbal and crispy solo-dinner dish featuring minced beef that is caramelized to perfection, perfect for a low-sodium-friendly meal.
instructions: Clean and thinly slice the beef. Season with kosher salt and black pepper.
Heat a bit of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the finely chopped onions to the heated pan, sauté until translucent.
Next, add the minced garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Gently fold in the seasoned beef slices. Stir-fry the beef until it starts to brown lightly on all sides.
Sprinkle with cilantro (optional) just before serving.
Serve hot as a solo-dinner dish.
